  rw [show ((X - C 9 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49)).coeff 3 = 1 by 
        rw [show (X - C 9 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) = X^3 - C 83 * X^2 + C 1519 * X - C 11025 by ring]; simp] at h_c3
  rw [show ((X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49)).coeff 3 = 1 by 
        rw [show (X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) = X^3 - C 75 * X^2 + C 1249 * X - C 1225 by ring]; simp] at h_c3
  rw [show ((X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 49)).coeff 3 = 1 by 
        rw [show (X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 49) = X^3 - C 59 * X^2 + C 539 * X - C 441 by ring]; simp] at h_c3
  rw [show ((X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25)).coeff 3 = 1 by 
        rw [show (X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) = X^3 - C 35 * X^2 + C 259 * X - C 225 by ring]; simp] at h_c3
  rw [show ((X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49)).coeff 3 = -84 by 
        rw [show (X - C 1 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) = X^4 - C 84 * X^3 + C 1974 * X^2 - C 12964 * X + C 11025 by ring]; simp] at h_c3
  rw [show ((X - C 4 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 16) * (X - C 36) * (X - C 64)).coeff 3 = -120 by 
        rw [show (X - C 4 : Polynomial ℝ) * (X - C 16) * (X - C 36) * (X - C 64) = X^4 - C 120 * X^3 + C 4340 * X^2 - C 52224 * X + C 147456 by ring]; simp] at h_c3
        
  linarith [h_c3]

let X : ℝ[X] := Polynomial.X
  let C := Polynomial.C
  let P := (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49)
  let Q := C (x^2) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) +
           C (y^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) +
           C (z^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 49) +
           C (w^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) - P
  let R := (X - C 4) * (X - C 16) * (X - C 36) * (X - C 64)
  let S := Q + R

  have hS_roots : ∀ t ∈ ({4, 16, 36, 64} : Set ℝ), S.eval t = 0 := by
    intro t ht
    rcases ht with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
    · norm_num at h₀; simp [S, Q, P, R]; linear_combination -14175 * h₀
    · norm_num at h₁; simp [S, Q, P, R]; linear_combination 31185 * h₁
    · norm_num at h₂; simp [S, Q, P, R]; linear_combination -135135 * h₂
    · norm_num at h₃; simp [S, Q, P, R]; linear_combination 2027025 * h₃

  have hP_eq : P = X^4 - C 84 * X^3 + C 2204 * X^2 - C 18096 * X + C 11025 := by simp [P]; ring
  have hR_eq : R = X^4 - C 120 * X^3 + C 4752 * X^2 - C 69632 * X + C 147456 := by simp [R]; ring
  have h_cubic : ∀ a b c, (X - C a) * (X - C b) * (X - C c) = 
      X^3 - C (a+b+c) * X^2 + C (a*b+b*c+c*a) * X - C (a*b*c) := by 
    intros; simp; ring

  have hS4 : S.coeff 4 = 0 := by simp [S, Q, hP_eq, hR_eq, h_cubic]; ring

  have hS_deg : S.natDegree ≤ 3 := by
    rw [Polynomial.natDegree_le_iff_coeff_eq_zero_of_gt]
    intro n hn
    have : n = 4 ∨ n > 4 := by linarith
    rcases this with rfl | h
    · exact hS4
    · simp [S, Q, hP_eq, hR_eq, h_cubic, Polynomial.coeff_X_pow]
      repeat rw [Polynomial.coeff_add]
      repeat rw [Polynomial.coeff_sub]
      repeat rw [Polynomial.coeff_C_mul]
      repeat rw [Polynomial.coeff_X_pow]
      simp; split_ifs <;> linarith

  have hS_zero : S = 0 := 
    Polynomial.eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt_card_roots (lt_of_le_of_lt hS_deg (by norm_num)) 
      (by rw [card_eq_four] <;> simp <;> norm_num) hS_roots

  have hS3 : S.coeff 3 = 0 := by rw [hS_zero, Polynomial.coeff_zero]
  simp [S, Q, hP_eq, hR_eq, h_cubic] at hS3
  ring_nf at hS3
  linarith

open Polynomial
  let poles : Finset ℝ := {1, 9, 25, 49}
  let roots : Finset ℝ := {4, 16, 36, 64}
  let P := ∏ c in poles, (X - C c)
  let S := C (x^2) * (∏ c in poles.erase 1, (X - C c)) +
           C (y^2) * (∏ c in poles.erase 9, (X - C c)) +
           C (z^2) * (∏ c in poles.erase 25, (X - C c)) +
           C (w^2) * (∏ c in poles.erase 49, (X - C c))
  let Q := P - S

  have hQ : ∀ t ∈ roots, Q.eval t = 0 := by
    intro t ht
    have h_eval (c : ℝ) (hc : c ∈ poles) : ∏ k in poles.erase c, (t - k) = P.eval t / (t - c) := by
      rw [P, eval_prod, ← Finset.insert_erase hc, Finset.prod_insert (Finset.not_mem_erase _ _)]
      field_simp [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
      rcases ht with rfl|rfl|rfl|rfl <;> rcases hc with rfl|rfl|rfl|rfl <;> norm_num
    simp only [Q, P, S, eval_sub, eval_add, eval_mul, eval_C, eval_prod, sub_eq_zero]
    rw [h_eval 1 (by norm_num), h_eval 9 (by norm_num), h_eval 25 (by norm_num), h_eval 49 (by norm_num)]
    rw [← mul_add, ← mul_add, ← mul_add]
    have h_sum : x^2 / (t - 1) + y^2 / (t - 9) + z^2 / (t - 25) + w^2 / (t - 49) = 1 := by
      rcases ht with rfl|rfl|rfl|rfl
      · convert h₀ using 1; field_simp; ring
      · convert h₁ using 1; field_simp; ring
      · convert h₂ using 1; field_simp; ring
      · convert h₃ using 1; field_simp; ring
    rw [h_sum, mul_one]

  have Q_monic : Q.Monic := by
    apply monic_sub_of_left
    · exact monic_prod_of_monic _ _ (fun _ _ => monic_X_sub_C _)
    · rw [degree_prod _ _ (fun _ _ => monic_X_sub_C _)]
      simp only [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_singleton, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, not_false_iff, ne_eq, or_self, false_or, forall_eq_or_imp, true_and]
      norm_num
      apply lt_of_le_of_lt (degree_sum_le _ _)
      simp; intro i hi
      apply le_trans (degree_mul_le _ _)
      rw [degree_C, zero_add, degree_prod]; simp
      rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem hi]; norm_num
      intros; exact monic_X_sub_C _

  have Q_eq : Q = ∏ r in roots, (X - C r) := by
    apply eq_prod_roots_of_monic_of_degree_eq_card_roots Q_monic
    · rw [natDegree_eq_of_degree_eq_some (degree_eq_of_monic Q_monic rfl)]
    · exact hQ
    · simp; norm_num

  have nextCoeff_prod (s : Finset ℝ) : (∏ x in s, (X - C x)).nextCoeff = - ∑ x in s, x := by
    induction s using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty => simp
    | insert ha ih =>
      rw [Finset.prod_insert ha, Finset.sum_insert ha, nextCoeff_mul, ih, nextCoeff_X_sub_C,
          monic_X_sub_C.leadingCoeff, (monic_prod_of_monic _ _ (fun _ _ => monic_X_sub_C _)).leadingCoeff]
      ring; exact monic_X_sub_C; exact monic_prod_of_monic _ _ (fun _ _ => monic_X_sub_C _)

  have nQ : Q.nextCoeff = -(4+16+36+64) := by rw [Q_eq, nextCoeff_prod]; simp; ring
  have nP : P.nextCoeff = -(1+9+25+49) := by rw [P, nextCoeff_prod]; simp; ring

  have cQ : Q.coeff 3 = Q.nextCoeff := by
    rw [nextCoeff, natDegree_eq_of_degree_eq_some (degree_eq_of_monic Q_monic rfl)]; rfl
  have cP : P.coeff 3 = P.nextCoeff := by
    rw [nextCoeff, natDegree_eq_of_degree_eq_some (degree_eq_of_monic (monic_prod_of_monic _ _ (fun _ _ => monic_X_sub_C _)) rfl)]; rfl

  have cS : S.coeff 3 = x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + w^2 := by
    rw [S, coeff_add, coeff_add, coeff_add, coeff_C_mul, coeff_C_mul, coeff_C_mul, coeff_C_mul]
    have h3 (s : Finset ℝ) (h : s.card = 3) : (∏ x in s, (X - C x)).coeff 3 = 1 := by
      rw [← h, (monic_prod_of_monic s (X-C ·) (fun _ _ => monic_X_sub_C _)).leadingCoeff]
      rw [natDegree_prod]; simp; intros; exact monic_X_sub_C _
    rw [h3 _ (by simp [poles]; norm_num), h3 _ (by simp [poles]; norm_num), h3 _ (by simp [poles]; norm_num), h3 _ (by simp [poles]; norm_num)]
    ring

  rw [Q, coeff_sub, cP, cS, nP] at cQ
  rw [nQ] at cQ
  linarith

let P : Polynomial ℝ := Polynomial.C (x^2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49) +
                  Polynomial.C (y^2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49) +
                  Polynomial.C (z^2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49) +
                  Polynomial.C (w^2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25) -
                  (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49)
  let Q : Polynomial ℝ := - (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 4) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 16) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 36) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 64)
  have h_deg : (P - Q).degree < 4 := by
    rw [Polynomial.degree_lt_iff_coeff_zero]
    · intro n hn
      have : n = 4 ∨ n > 4 := by linarith
      cases' this with h4 hgt
      · rw [h4]; simp [P, Q]; ring
      · apply Polynomial.coeff_eq_zero_of_degree_lt
        have dP : P.degree ≤ 4 := by compute_degree_le
        have dQ : Q.degree ≤ 4 := by compute_degree_le
        apply le_trans (Polynomial.degree_sub_le P Q)
        rw [max_le_iff]; exact ⟨dP, dQ⟩
        linarith
    · exact Nat.le_refl 4
  have h_roots : ∀ t ∈ ({4, 16, 36, 64} : Finset ℝ), (P - Q).eval t = 0 := by
    intro t ht
    fin_cases ht <;> simp [P, Q]
    · have : (2^2 - 1 : ℝ) * (2^2 - 3^2) * (2^2 - 5^2) * (2^2 - 7^2) ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₀ ⊢; rw [h₀]; ring
    · have : (4^2 - 1 : ℝ) * (4^2 - 3^2) * (4^2 - 5^2) * (4^2 - 7^2) ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₁ ⊢; rw [h₁]; ring
    · have : (6^2 - 1 : ℝ) * (6^2 - 3^2) * (6^2 - 5^2) * (6^2 - 7^2) ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₂ ⊢; rw [h₂]; ring
    · have : (8^2 - 1 : ℝ) * (8^2 - 3^2) * (8^2 - 5^2) * (8^2 - 7^2) ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₃ ⊢; rw [h₃]; ring
  have h_eq : P = Q := by
    apply Polynomial.eq_of_sub_eq_zero
    apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_degree_lt_of_eval_eq_zero ({4, 16, 36, 64} : Finset ℝ)
    · simp; norm_num at h_deg; exact h_deg
    · exact h_roots
  have c3 : P.coeff 3 = Q.coeff 3 := by rw [h_eq]
  simp [P, Q] at c3
  ring_nf at c3
  linarith

open Polynomial
  let P : Polynomial ℝ := (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) -
    (C (x^2) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) +
     C (y^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) +
     C (z^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 49) +
     C (w^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25))
  have h_monic : Monic P := by
    apply Monic.sub_of_left
    · repeat apply Monic.mul <;> apply Monic.X_sub_C
    · apply degree_lt_degree_of_monic
      · repeat apply Monic.mul <;> apply Monic.X_sub_C
      · simp; repeat apply max_lt
        all_goals { apply (degree_C_mul_le _ _).trans_lt; simp [degree_mul]; norm_num }
  have h_roots : ∀ t ∈ ({4, 16, 36, 64} : Set ℝ), P.eval t = 0 := by
    rintro t (rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl)
    · simp only [P, eval_sub, eval_mul, eval_add, eval_C, eval_X, eval_pow]
      have := h₀; norm_num at this ⊢; field_simp at this ⊢; linarith
    · simp only [P, eval_sub, eval_mul, eval_add, eval_C, eval_X, eval_pow]
      have := h₁; norm_num at this ⊢; field_simp at this ⊢; linarith
    · simp only [P, eval_sub, eval_mul, eval_add, eval_C, eval_X, eval_pow]
      have := h₂; norm_num at this ⊢; field_simp at this ⊢; linarith
    · simp only [P, eval_sub, eval_mul, eval_add, eval_C, eval_X, eval_pow]
      have := h₃; norm_num at this ⊢; field_simp at this ⊢; linarith
  let Q : Polynomial ℝ := (X - C 4) * (X - C 16) * (X - C 36) * (X - C 64)
  have h_eq : P = Q := by
    apply Polynomial.eq_prod_roots_of_monic_of_degree_eq_card_roots h_monic
    · simp; norm_num
    · simp; use 4, 16, 36, 64; simp; norm_num
    · exact h_roots
  have h_coeff : P.coeff 3 = Q.coeff 3 := by rw [h_eq]
  rw [coeff_sub] at h_coeff
  have c1 : ((X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49)).coeff 3 = -84 := by simp; ring
  have c2 : (C (x^2) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) +
             C (y^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 25) * (X - C 49) +
             C (z^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 49) +
             C (w^2) * (X - C 1) * (X - C 9) * (X - C 25)).coeff 3 = x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + w^2 := by simp; ring
  have c3 : Q.coeff 3 = -120 := by simp [Q]; ring
  rw [c1, c2, c3] at h_coeff
  linarith
